title: Lower Bicutan Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Lower Bicutan with a Z-Score of +3.23. The event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Lower Bicutan is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) of 10.3 GG. 
 The humidity level is at 78%, which is relatively high, and the wind speed is at 7.7 km/h, providing little relief. 
 The lack of Heating Degree Days (HDD) at 0.0 GG indicates that the temperatures are consistently high, with no expected drop in the near future.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of this critical event.
